zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Cameron於大約1320年出生在蘇格蘭培爾音圖時，她的父親Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron38歲，母親Ellen Mowat of Montealto29歲。她於1354年與Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾迪萊頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1380年在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Cameron于大约1320年出生在苏格兰培爾音圖时，她的父亲Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron38岁，母亲Ellen Mowat of Montealto29岁。她于1354年与Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾迪萊頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1380年在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cameron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: in the Highlands, it is usually a nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + sròn ‘nose’.
in the Lowlands it is also a habitational name from any of various places called Cameron, especially in Fife.

variants.name: Cambron
meanings: Spanish (Cambrón): habitational name from any of several places in the provinces of Cáceres and Murcia called Cambrón.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Somme and Aisne called Cambron. Alternatively, from a diminutive of c(h)ambre ‘room’ (see Cambre ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Cameron was born about 1320, in Inchture, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron, was 38 and her mother, Ellen Mowat of Montealto, was 29. She married Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton in 1354, in Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1380, in Dirleton, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Cameron est née environ 1320, à Inchture, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Ellen Mowat of Montealto, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton en 1354, à Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1380, à Dirleton, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

Sie hat 1354 in Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Cameron è nata il circa 1320 nel Inchture, Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Ellen Mowat of Montealto, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton nel 1354, nel Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1380, nel Dirleton, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Cameronが約1320年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアインチトゥアで生まれた時，父Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameronは38歳，母Ellen Mowat of Montealtoは29歳であった。1354年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアディルレトンでSir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1380年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンディルレトンで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Cameron(이)가 대략 1320년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 인ch처에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Mowat of Montealto(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1354년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 디를레턴에서 Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 디를레턴에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Cameron родилась около 1320 г. в местности инчтур, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Cameron - Laird of Ballegarno, 6th Chief of Clan Cameron было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Mowat of Montealto, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton в 1354 г. в местности дирлетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1380 г. в местности дирлетон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.
